name: plink_execution_tool
description: Run local PLINK 2 QC commands on a VCF.

help.summary: Open the curated PLINK 2 QC workflow for the active VCF source.

modes.name: qc
modes.description: Prepare the PLINK Studio card for frequency, missingness, and Hardy-Weinberg summaries.

modes.name: score
modes.description: Run PLINK --score on the active target genotype VCF using the latest PRS prep score file.

options.name: mode
options.description: Workflow mode. The current ChatGenome build supports qc and score.

options.name: score_file_path
options.description: Optional explicit score file path. In ChatGenome, @plink score normally uses the latest PRS prep output.

options.name: missing
options.description: Run sample and variant missingness summary.

options.name: allow_extra_chr
options.description: Allow non-canonical chromosome labels when preparing the run.

notes: Uses the active VCF source by default.
The current ChatGenome flow opens the PLINK Studio card, where the final QC configuration can be reviewed before execution.
For score mode, run @skill prs_prep first on a summary-statistics source, then upload a target genotype VCF and run @plink score.
